summary: A Go-based monolithic CLI tool featuring a test runner, schema validation, MCP integration, and webhook reporting, currently undergoing heavy automated test expansion.
concerns: high volume of agent-generated extra test files indicates potential test bloat or automated scaffolding overhead
deeply nested agent directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/) pollute the repository tree
1 staged file during analysis suggests incomplete or interrupted workflow
heavy reliance on _extra_test.go files may indicate gaps in primary test coverage
suggestions: consolidate or archive agent-generated test directories to reduce repository noise
evaluate if extra tests can be merged into standard test files for better maintainability
review the MCP handlers implementation for production readiness given recent test additions
ensure the staged change is properly committed or stashed to maintain a clean working tree
